tabs.apiDescription: Connect external platform data sources to automatically sync chat records to ChatLab on a schedule.
tabs.pushDescription: Start the local API server to let third-party tools, plugins, or scripts push chat records directly into ChatLab.

import.clickHint: Click to select or drag chat records to import
import.multipleHint: Multiple files can be selected or dragged at once

errors.no_messages: No messages parsed. Please check if the file format is correct.
errors.archive_single_file_required: Import archive files one at a time
errors.archive_unsupported: This archive format is not supported
errors.archive_corrupt: The archive is corrupt or incomplete
errors.archive_unsafe_path: The archive contains an unsafe file path
errors.archive_limit_exceeded: The archive exceeds the safe processing limit
errors.google_chat_structure_not_found: No Google Chat export data was found
errors.google_chat_conversation_incomplete: A Google Chat conversation is missing required files
errors.import_source_not_found: The import source no longer exists. Select the archive again.
errors.import_source_expired: The import source expired. Select the archive again.
errors.actionHint: You can try manual format matching or view the log below:

options.mergeImportHint: Multiple files will be merged into one chat record

demo.failed: Failed to load demo data. Please check your network and try again.

migration.title: Database upgrade required
migration.description: {count} database(s) need to be upgraded for new features.
migration.note: The upgrade usually takes only a few seconds and won't lose any data.
migration.errorHint: This is usually caused by corrupted database files. Please delete the failed sessions from the sidebar and re-import them.

formatSelector.title: Select Chat Format
formatSelector.hint: Unable to auto-detect the file format. Please manually select the corresponding chat format.
